_meta.description: Industry-wide LIFE insurance totals per fiscal year — total premium (new business + renewal), LIC share of life, and the PSU vs private split of TOTAL insurance premium (life + general). The life side of the Industry Snapshot ring cards. The GI side comes live from industry-segment-premium.json (GI Council); this file carries the annual IRDAI figures that have no monthly source.
_meta.refresh_cadence: annual — IRDAI Annual Report (published ~Dec). The December annual ingest cadence refreshes this file; an official source file dropped into data/raw/irdai/ also auto-triggers ingestion (insurance-data-ingest.yml push path).
_meta.metric_basis: total premium (first-year + renewal), Rs crore — a premium metric, not profit
_meta.notes: psu_total_premium / private_total_premium are on a TOTAL-insurance basis (life + GI combined): IRDAI life totals with LIC = 57% of life, composed with the GI Council FY25 public/private GI mix. Marked best-estimate; refresh from the next IRDAI Annual Report.

data.basis: life total premium per IRDAI Annual Report 2024-25; PSU/private split best-estimate composition (life via LIC share + GI Council FY25 GI mix)

provenance.source_name: IRDAI Annual Report 2024-25 (life total premium, LIC share); GI Council FY25 segment report (GI composition)
